issues.description: Deferred residual from r2 remains: log CSV exports the raw payload JSON in Details. I found no new regression here; the UI already renders the same raw payload in EventLogTable, access is admin-scoped, and current payload producers reviewed do not appear to store secrets.
issues.recommendation: Keep deferred unless product/security policy requires CSV to be stricter than the admin log table; then introduce an allowlist/redaction mapper for payload Details.
issues.deferRationale: Previously accepted disposition remains valid: this is admin-scoped parity with the existing raw Details UI, not a newly introduced blocking leak.

issues.description: Focused vitest execution could not complete in this read-only sandbox: `npm test -- --run src/lib/csv.test.ts` failed during config startup with `spawn EPERM` from esbuild. Static review confirmed LF is in the injection prefix set and neutralization still runs before RFC4180 quoting.
issues.recommendation: Rely on the supplied local green gate for runtime confirmation; no code change indicated by this sandbox-only execution failure.
issues.deferRationale: Environment execution restriction, not a product defect. The user reported local tsc/lint/vitest/build green.
